horoscope: In the first half of the day, dear Aries, it can be somewhat challenging to integrate your needs for mental stimulation with attention to your responsibilities, but not impossible, either. While transits now are useful for identifying flaws so they can be edited and fixed, if this same energy is applied to personal connections, it can be a bit of a downer. Particularly now, watch for being too critical or self-critical. Enjoying yourself comes more readily as the day advances. Ideas and plans energize you, but with a New Moon set to occur in your solar second house tomorrow, it's a natural end of a cycle in which new projects are best set aside in preparation for new beginnings to come. Examine insecurities if they arise, as some self-understanding can put you in a stronger position going forward into a new cycle. It makes a lot of sense to clear your head today. However, it can be immensely helpful to review recent developments.

In the first half of the day, there can be some worry or overstimulation related to matters of the past, dear Taurus. For the most part, however, you can come up with some great ideas, and you can be skilled at getting to the bottom line. Today, watch for resistance or blocks, possibly stemming from unnecessary self-criticism or pressure on yourself. Happily, as the day advances, you can enjoy excellent ideas and insights forming. You're thinking outside the box about financial matters, which can benefit you greatly. Improvements tend to occur as a result of happiness or contentment with yourself, and it’s about learning to love and accept who you are right now. Still, it's a day for taking it easy, as the Moon in your sign is Balsamic. A New Moon will occur in your sign tomorrow, launching a visible, powerful cycle for personal new beginnings. Today, rest, reflect, and prepare for quicker and busier days to come.

In the first half of the day, you may need to check your work twice or make some crucial edits, dear Gemini. It's best to get these out of the way. Keep in mind, though, that transits now have a way of revealing the flaws more than the benefits of a situation. Still, as the day advances, it's a great time for coming up with fresh and exciting ideas. There can be some excitement about a longer-term plan or project. A friendship can come into high focus, and you can feel inspired. At the same time, due to this being the day before a New Moon, it's a good idea to prioritize replenishment and rest. Your private life is lighting up now. It's appropriate to think and process instead of pushing yourself forward.

In the first half of the day, you could be feeling a little serious regarding your career, life direction, ambitions, or reputation, dear Cancer. While you'd like to detach yourself from it, it can be a bit of a challenge right now. However, as the day goes on, it's much easier to let things go if they're not doing you any good. Connecting with exciting ideas and strong energy for creative and innovative thinking about business or long-term goals can be a theme. At the same time, it's important to aim to be flexible. You're no longer focusing on the mistakes or troubles of the past, unless you aim to let go of them and move on. In fact, if you can do so, all the better, as the Moon is Balsamic and what we let go of now has more chance of staying in our past.

In the first half of the day, Mercury's minor challenging aspects can lead to a tendency to see the flaws more than the benefits of a given situation, dear Leo. Tensions may primarily revolve around your beliefs, opinions, transportation, commuting, and perspective. It may be that you're dealing with minor inconveniences and having a hard time finding time to think clearly or see the big picture. Still, as the day advances, you're building and inspiring faith in your relationships and coming to peaceful agreements about money, power, and sharing. Transits today bring opportunities to learn and heal. Because a New Moon will occur tomorrow, it's particularly appropriate to wind down rather than wind yourself up today. Tying up loose ends and otherwise freeing yourself of excess baggage is a good idea to clear the way for new beginnings.

Circumstances may be such that you have more decision-making responsibility in the first half of the day, dear Virgo. There may be a need to deal with more than the usual inconveniences or with unwelcome advice and critique, but it's nothing you can't handle. Try not to take offhand remarks too seriously, even if they appear contrary. As the day advances, work or business can do well if you apply nontraditional thinking to these matters. The desire to innovate is strong. Still, because the Moon is Balsamic today, this is a time for letting go rather than revving up. Pay attention to random feelings and thoughts today, as this is a time for self-improvement through extending yourself beyond your normal routine. The New Moon tomorrow may point you in a new direction along these lines. It's more appropriate to tie up loose ends and process recent events than to charge ahead with new plans during this Moon phase.

In the first half of the day, others may be withholding or critical, but it's best not to take these things too much to heart, dear Libra. Constructive criticism is one thing, and today's particularness quite another, so aim to pay it little or no mind. You may see the flaws of a situation before its benefits, and if you don't dwell on them, this can help you fix problems. As the day advances, it's easy to let go and stretch your mind as well. You’ll find it easier than usual to stumble upon the information or resources you need to resolve problems or advance your interests, in fact. There can be unexpected benefits coming through a faraway connection or partnership this week. With a New Moon occurring tomorrow, it's particularly useful to wind down and let go. We are symbolically in the dark today, so it makes sense to put off new beginnings and instead focus on letting go of attitudes or attachments that are dragging you down.

In the first half of the day, be easy on yourself and humble with others for better results, dear Scorpio, as minor challenging aspects can stir up a tendency for negative thinking or unnecessary criticism. Misrepresenting your heart through what you say can be in focus. Energies of later today challenge you to let go of familiar methods if they no longer work for you and create new ones. At the same time, a New Moon will occur tomorrow, making today a better period for taking in instead of taking concrete action. Aim to tie up loose ends, deal with details, do research, and perfect projects that are already in motion.

In the first half of the day, dear Sagittarius, minor challenging transits can work for and against you, or a bit of both, depending on how they play out. There can be a focus on flaws that can lead to useful edits. Misunderstandings or delays that you hadn't anticipated can figure strongly, however. If a problem is beyond your control, focus on what you can fix or take a break from overthinking before returning to the problem areas. As the day advances, you can relax enough to allow your intuition to kick in. New ways to make your routines, work, or home life pleasant can emerge. Today can be liberating in some ways. It’s a fine time to generate ideas or solve a problem that clears the path for new directions. The Moon is Balsamic today, and this means that you are best off pacing yourself and striving for balance.

Energies today suggest that it's probably better to focus on editing and fixing problems than pushing the envelope, dear Capricorn. Double-check your communications for the best results in the first half of the day. Fears or insecurities can skew conversations to complaints and thoughts to negative places. As the day advances, you could feel freer in self-expression and a little more courageous on a mental level, but it remains a good time to pace yourself. Tomorrow's New Moon will clear the slate for new beginnings on romantic or creative fronts, igniting a boost of confidence. Today, take extra time for reflection and for finishing up projects or letting go of tensions that might interfere with your New Moon goals.

In the first half of the day, especially, look for ways to make improvements if faced with blocks, dear Aquarius. It's best to stick to the rules and directions, but as the day advances, allowing your intuition to kick in makes more sense. Good ideas are easier to come by this way. Tomorrow, a New Moon will occur that will offer you a burst of take-charge energy for home and family matters. Today is important for reflecting on and letting go of things and attitudes that no longer serve you well. You might consider putting projects to rest or aside if they can wait and if they will interfere with getting the important rest and regeneration you need in the coming days and possibly weeks.

In the first half of the day, dear Pisces, while there can be annoying reminders of what's not working for you, opportunities to enjoy yourself and learn something new emerge and delight as the day advances. You could find these reminders to be ultimately valuable. There may be some worry or insecurity about finances or relationships, and it makes sense to avoid making decisions based on the mixed perceptions of the moment. If you find that others are defensive of their feelings or personal space, you might decide to save the big conversations for later. Aim to work on those projects that are already in progress or take some downtime. With a New Moon occurring tomorrow, it's best to wait to begin brand new endeavors. Things seem to wind down under a Balsamic Moon, so don't strain yourself. The New Moon tomorrow is bound to stir new interests, lines of thought, ideas, and learning experiences in the week ahead.
